The test should verify that the block still life pattern remains unchanged after one generation.
Input: [[0,0],[1,0],[0,1],[1,1]] → output should be the same 4 cells (order-independent comparison).
Use a set-based or sorted comparison so order doesn't matter. e.g.:
```
const sortKey = (c) => `${c[0]},${c[1]}`;
expect(result.map(sortKey).sort()).toEqual(input.map(sortKey).sort());
```
Or use `expect(new Set(result.map(c => c.join(",")))).toEqual(new Set(input.map(c => c.join(","))))`.

EXPERIMENT MODE: Run autonomously, proceed to Green after completion.
You MUST output the full Step 7 block verbatim (both Compilation
Prediction and Runtime Prediction lines, each with Correct or
Incorrect). Do not abbreviate. Do not collapse the two prediction
lines into one.
